title: BOTW 13
body:
5- Kass ''Mipha's Ballad''

11- Kass ''The Champions' Ballad'' (2nd Stage)

13- Champion Revali's Song

blocks- Kass ''Revali's Ballad''

cat- Kass ''The Champions' Ballad'' (3rd Stage)

chirp- Champion Daruk's Song

far- Kass ''Daruk's Ballad''

mall- Kass ''The Champions' Ballad'' (4th Stage)

mellohi- Champion Urbosa's Song

otherside- Kass ''Urbosa's Ballad''

pigstep- Final Trial

relic- Monk Maz Koshia Battle

stal- The Forgotten Memory (The Champions' Ballad)

strad- Princess Zelda and the Champions

wait- Ending of The Champions' Ballad

ward- Framed Picture

Please donate to AbleGamers to help "create opportunities that enable play for people with disabilities and improve their quality of life while prioritizing two core objectives: enabling people with disabilities to access video games with ease and empowering game creators and developers to design games with maximum accessibility".

https://ablegamers.org
